items.title: Israeli strikes kill six people in Gaza including Al Jazeera cameraman, officials say
items.dek: The Israeli military accused Ahmed Wishah of being a "Hamas sniper operative", without providing evidence.

items.title: Ranch lovers, rejoice: Kraft to debut TSA‑friendly kit amid viral craze

items.title: Lebanese turtle conservationist Mona Khalil killed by Israeli strike
items.dek: Mona Khalil, who had refused to leave the beach she had spent years protecting, died from her injuries after the Israeli strike.
items.body: Mona Khalil, who had refused to leave the beach she had spent years protecting, died from her injuries after the Israeli strike.
